documents.title: 278-T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report listing 2 transactions: sale of Totem Management Seed on 09/23/2025 ($250,001–$500,000) and sale of GreenGage Global Holdings on 11/27/2025 ($100,001–$250,000).

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification (Amended Ethics Agreement Enclosure)
documents.summary: 12/8/2025 cover letter from DAEO Mark Vetter enclosing a December 5, 2025 ethics agreement amendment. The amendment addresses three illiquid assets Bessent did not divest within the 90-day window — High Plains Acres LLP, Greengage Global Holdings Ltd., and Aperion (DE) Feeder Fund — and sets new divestiture commitments (Greengage and Aperion by 12/15/2025; High Plains Acres farmlands via promissory note no later than 12/15/2025).

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification
documents.summary: Cover transmittal for an ethics agreement amendment package. Document type marked 'Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance' on OGE; contents continue Treasury DAEO correspondence regarding Bessent's outstanding divestiture status.

documents.title: 278-T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report listing 24 transactions dated 01/28/2025 through 06/30/2025. All sales, including Key Square Group LP, Key Square Partners II, Castle Hook LP, Old Farm Partners, Roxo Energy Funding IV, iShares MSCI Germany/Thailand ETFs, SPDR Gold Shares (GLD), and Verizon Communications.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification (with July 15 ethics agreement amendment)
documents.summary: PDF portfolio package. Includes a 7/15/2025 Vetter letter enclosing an ethics agreement amendment in which Bessent retains three originally-listed divestiture targets — Presight RV Co-Invest Fund LP, Half Acre WSW LLC (Waterloo Sparkling Water), and Cambrian Biopharma Series A & C — citing illiquid private holdings and limited Treasury regulatory nexus.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification
documents.summary: Initial self-certification signed 5/2/2025; due date 5/5/2025; ethics agreement signed 1/9/2025; confirmed 1/27/2025. Marked 'Yes' on resignations, interim recusals, ongoing recusals (personal/imputed and former-employer), and ethics briefing. Marked 'No' on completed divestitures and 'No' on 278-T filings to date. Appointee comments state divestitures of required assets had been initiated but not yet completed and 278-T had not yet been filed.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement (Amended 12/08/2025)
documents.summary: Ethics agreement signed 1/9/2025 with subsequent amendments dated 5/2/2025, 6/5/2025, 7/15/2025, and 12/5/2025. PDF includes the original commitments to resign from Key Square Group and related entities and to divest a long list of private fund and partnership interests, plus the cumulative amendment letters that extend, modify, or retain specific holdings (Presight RV, Half Acre WSW/Waterloo Sparkling Water, Cambrian Biopharma, High Plains Acres, Greengage Global, Aperion Feeder Fund).

documents.title: Nominee 278 (Amended 05/05/2025)
documents.summary: Nominee Public Financial Disclosure (OGE Form 278e) for Secretary of the Treasury. Filer signed 12/28/2024; amended 5/2/2025 to add two previously-omitted nonprofit board roles (Classical American Homes Preservation Trust and Middleton Place Foundation). Outside positions include CEO/CIO/Founder of Key Square Group LP, executor of three estates, trustee of multiple South Carolina trusts (C.P. 2012 Trust, Palmetto Management 2020 Trust), Chairman of the Investment Committee at Rockefeller University, and managing member of Cape and Palmetto LLC and Maison Douze LLC.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: ProPublica surfaces 2 main document types: the amended Form 278e and Form 278-T transaction reports spanning Feb–Dec 2025. Open Cabinet documents 8 OGE records including 4 distinct compliance certification filings (7/16, 7/26, 11/14, 12/08) which ProPublica does not enumerate separately. Both data sources reflect Bessent's repeated ethics agreement amendments addressing illiquid holdings.
